reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
The school denied admission to my daughter due to her mild ADHD, despite her being intelligent and performing well academically. They stated that they do not have special educators, which goes against government guidelines on inclusive education.

There may also be another reason for the rejection, possibly related to religion. Noida is often perceived as having bias against the Muslim community, and this could have influenced their decision.

I am writing to the education authorities to highlight how such practices are affecting children today. I am aware that no action may be taken, but I believe it is important to raise awareness about these biases. It is concerning that institutions responsible for educating children may themselves lack an understanding of equality.

reviews.author: Mina T
reviews.review_body:
This School at class 9 icse not offers subject choices updated. In group C of class 9 icse it not offers good scoring cputer science which is essential. At 78K per month , same group moulsari school offers more subject choices in class 9, 11 updated with NEP

ICSE board unregulated in UP by state , and by DOSEL eduMin both. So such subject choices un updated at class 9, 11 levels becomes compounding because of lack of.monitoring aspect.

In Social , disciplinary areas - school teacher presence ineffectiveness whether at Bus or in class  is NOT  enough self reviewed conservative manner. Slang excessive region with lot variety of attention seekers exist - such rounded ness absence on school own side compounds ineffective ness.

In SUPW side - efforts like Yamuna banks clear, kitchen garden at school and other such examples substanceful not inculcated.

Running 2 other boards in same school caused focus less on cicse

reviews.author: Noopur Khare
reviews.review_body: A very good school where teachers put their all efforts while teaching and their teaching methods are too good

reviews.author: Sumit Nath Mukerjee
reviews.review_body: A very good school with all sports and curricular and extra curricular activities. Worth admitting your child.

reviews.author: Rita Sinha Ray
reviews.review_body:
The best school in Noida following a complete child centric methodology. It's a 'happy school' for every individual who walks into the premises. Through various hands on activities in class, through music, dance, basketball , soccer..... in every domain the school believes giving exposure to the young minds to excel in their chosen fields.
With well trained academic staff at every level the school follows ICSE/ISC curriculum and is a leading name in NCR for its exemplary Board Examination results year after year.
It is a school with HEART.
